direction: cache boundary time-series index on the row-offset branch
rationale: v42_rowoff still computes jt * mesh.CELL + pos twice in CalculateKlas10 for QT/DQT and twice in CalculateKlas1 for ZT/DZT. Caching that integer time-series index once per helper removes duplicate address arithmetic while preserving the same array elements and all floating-point expressions.
